/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/csopesy_mo1.dir/src/commands/ClearCommand.cpp.o CMakeFiles/csopesy_mo1.dir/src/commands/ExitCommand.cpp.o CMakeFiles/csopesy_mo1.dir/src/commands/InitializeCommand.cpp.o CMakeFiles/csopesy_mo1.dir/src/commands/ReportUtilCommand.cpp.o CMakeFiles/csopesy_mo1.dir/src/commands/SchedulerCommand.cpp.o CMakeFiles/csopesy_mo1.dir/src/commands/ScreenCommand.cpp.o CMakeFiles/csopesy_mo1.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/csopesy_mo1.dir/src/misc/Helper.cpp.o CMakeFiles/csopesy_mo1.dir/src/services/ClearService.cpp.o CMakeFiles/csopesy_mo1.dir/src/services/ExitService.cpp.o CMakeFiles/csopesy_mo1.dir/src/services/InitializeService.cpp.o CMakeFiles/csopesy_mo1.dir/src/services/ReportUtilService.cpp.o CMakeFiles/csopesy_mo1.dir/src/services/SchedulerService.cpp.o CMakeFiles/csopesy_mo1.dir/src/services/ScreenService.cpp.o -o csopesy_mo1
